scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,tunnel -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/africa-travel run dev" "powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/start-tunnel.ps1"
